T3.justification: execute_sql wraps run_query in try/except catching SqlSafetyError and generic Exception returning {ok: False, error}; __main__.py wraps run_agent in try/except printing user-friendly 'Ошибка:' message to stderr without stack trace; db.py uses contextlib.suppress on connection close; agent recovers from bad SQL per test_agent_recovers_from_bad_sql.

T4.justification: Public functions have type hints (e.g. run_agent, run_query, validate_result, inspect_schema); modules well under 500 LoC each; docstrings present on modules, classes (Config, SqlSafetyError) and functions; readable naming (assert_select_only, _coerce, dispatch); no obvious dead code.

T7.justification: assert_select_only whitelists SELECT/WITH only and blocks DDL/DML tokens + multistatement (tests in test_db_safety.py); system prompt instructs Oracle DATE 'YYYY-MM-DD' literals and UPPER LIKE patterns. However LLM-generated SQL is interpolated directly via cur.execute(cleaned) without bind variables, so a malicious NL could still inject a crafted SELECT (e.g. data exfil via subquery) — token blacklist is the only barrier.

B1.justification: final_answer tool enforces 1-3 sentence NL response with numbers + units (system prompt rule 6, e.g. 'Общий доход составил 123 456 руб.'); fallback to plain assistant text if no tool call. No explicit markdown table formatting for long results — supporting_data is structured but not rendered as table.

B2.justification: Dedicated validate_result tool checks min_rows/max_rows/non_null_columns/non_zero_columns/value_ranges and flags issues; system prompt mandates calling validate_result after execute_sql with reasonable expectations; tests cover null/zero/range outlier detection.

B3.justification: Agent has MAX_TURNS=12 iteration limit, 6 sql_attempts limit, recovers from bad SQL (test_agent_recovers_from_bad_sql), inspect_schema returns error on unknown table, system prompt has clear defaults (MAX(MONTH_DT) for 'last month'). No explicit clarification flow for ambiguous NL — defaults are baked in via prompt rules.

B5.justification: Config loaded via env vars / .env, no hardcoded creds; logging.getLogger used in agent/tools; -v verbose flag; oracledb connection closed via contextlib.suppress in finally. Missing: no Dockerfile, no CI workflow, no connection pool, no retry logic, no structured logging (plain logging.basicConfig).
